raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Assembly approved legislation requiring oil companies to maintain minimum fuel reserves.",
    "The legislation aims to bring stability to prices at the gas pump.",
    "The Assembly Bill x2-1 protects frontline communities by prohibiting the construction of additional storage.",
    "Workforce safety is the primary consideration when establishing regulations in the approved legislation.",
    "The California Air Resources Board is mandated to complete its review of increased ethanol fuel blend by summer 2025.",
    "The legislation includes provisions to address supply concerns regarding gasoline prices.",
